message:
test(auth): add cross-cloud auth regression coverage for signing, expiry, and failure modes [24llg.3.5]

Add 30+ regression tests spanning AWS SigV4, S3 presigning, GCP JWT bearer
auth, and AWS client sanitization:

SigV4 (fcp-sdk): presigned URL session token inclusion, expiry boundary
(0s/604800s), payload/method signature differentiation, query param
preservation, credential scope validation, URI encoding, key size invariant.

GCP JWT: cached token Debug redaction, expiry safety margin boundaries,
lifetime/skew arithmetic, iat backdating, service account differentiation,
scope differentiation, URL encoding, PKCS#1 format rejection.

S3: presigned URL region/credential inclusion, expiry-dependent signature
differentiation, key-dependent URL differentiation, Debug redaction,
special char encoding.

AWS: path segment traversal blocking (empty, encoded), query param injection
(fragment, question mark), object key slash/traversal rules, auth Debug
redaction (access key, secret key, session token).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
